DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT HYLINE CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all claims alleged by Focus Development, LLC against Hyline Construction, Inc. and sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to all claims alleged by Tony Vella against Hyline. The demurrer is not opposed by Focus Development and that entity lacks standing. All claims alleged by Vella are insufficiently pled. Vella fails to allege any facts supporting any of his claims against Hyline. If he can do so in good faith, Vella is given leave to allege such facts. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
